title: Hard times
subtitle: Declarative under strain; ritual cutting and self-issued correction
description: An artifact documenting a self-issued correction order under strain. It captures the recognition of drift and the immediate, punitive removal of stimulation and comfort as a means of regaining control, identifying the tension between traditional discipline and an emergent, non-linear path.

motifMap.meaning: Ritual cutting of stimulation and comfort to regain perceived control over drift.
Internalized authority and the weight of disappointment in relation to a higher standard.

excerpt: I have been letting myself down and you down.

integrity.notes: Generated based on Phase Analysis for 'Hard times'. Filename: hard-times.phase-desert-faith--methodic-self-watching.metadata.v2.6.1.json
